No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
THE LAW FIRM OF MAYALL JURLEY P.C.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF LESLYE JUAREZ is continued to November 27 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its papers to department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm November 16, or the motion will be denied.
